critic_notes: Six questions on Thematische Abgrenzung. All quotes are verbatim. All correct answers are source-supported; all distractors are properly excluded. Question 005 is labeled 'experte' for identifying SDM Schutzziele -- this is recall of four specific terms (Datenminimierung, Intervenierbarkeit, Transparenz, Nichtverkettung) that require distinguishing them from the Informationssicherheit Grundwerte, which adds a layer of discrimination. Borderline but acceptable. Topic 'methodik' is appropriate throughout since the section defines the scope and terminology of Informationssicherheit.
